title: astragalus compactus
intro: Astragalus compactus, also known as the compact milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Asia, characterized by its small, yellow or white flowers and compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus compactus is believed to have various health benefits, such as enhancing immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus compactus is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
